notes: This refresh did not reopen CFD extraction. The dynamic-package clarification is documentation-only, while the heat-loss readability fix is a regeneration of the existing June 23 breakout package.

The q_dyn sawtooth explanation is grounded in the published dynamic_pressure_profile_rows.csv table, where repeated discrete bulk_velocity_m_s values produce repeated q_dyn levels in some coarse streamwise bins.
The refreshed heat-loss figures replace repeated per-subplot span labels with a single shared top span guide for the whole figure.
